key_notes: Must carry coverage if 3+ employees. Penalties for non-compliance include fines up to $100/day. Claims filed through NC Industrial Commission.
Threshold is 4+ regular employees. Agricultural employers with fewer than 4 employees are exempt. Second Injury Fund surcharge applies.
Virginia uses NCCI rates with state-specific modifications. Covers part-time employees. Executive officers may elect out with written waiver.
Threshold is 3+ regular employees. Farm laborers working fewer than 30 days excluded. Employer must post notice of coverage.
Construction employers: 5+ employee threshold includes subcontractors without their own coverage. Penalties for misrepresentation of payroll.
Construction industry: 1 employee triggers coverage. Non-construction: 4+ employees. Officers of corporations automatically covered. Exemptions require filing.
Virtually all employers must carry coverage from the first employee. Administered by Workers Compensation Commission. No exemptions for small employers.
Highest threshold — all employers with 1+ employees. Executive officers included unless they opt out. Construction class codes carry higher rates.
